case_title: KORABELLE PITA ET AL VS. JOSE LUIS REYES ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO FEE FOR SERVICE SERVED FEB-25-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT REYES, JOSE LUIS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PITA, KORABELLE PITA, MAVIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REYES, JOSE LUIS CITY SOURCE RENTAL & SUPPLY, LP. ANVIL BUILDERS, INC. $3,112.56 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,112.56, DEFENDANTS REYES, CITY SOURCE RENTAL AND ANVIL BUILDERS ARE JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY LIABLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY PITA, KORABELLE PITA, MAVIS AS TO DEFENDANT REYES, JOSE LUIS CITY SOURCE RENTAL & SUPPLY, LP. ANVIL BUILDERS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-01-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-01-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-01-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (3) WERE PRESENT.
